title: The Moon on a Rainy Night
titleEnglish: The Moon on a Rainy Night
synopsis: One day, while rushing to a piano lesson, a girl named Saki collides with someone on the street. As Saki collects herself, the stranger picks up the sheet music Saki dropped, hands it to Saki together with a band-aid, and continues on her way—all without sayin
searchTerms: The Moon on a Rainy Night

title: Urushi Uruhashi
synopsis: Mihiro Kanayama is a third-year high school student who aspires to become a lacquerware craftsman. He is given a challenge by his grandfather, who tells him to "create a piece while thinking about the person who would use it." He didn't know how to go about it, until he meets Tsumugi Fukaya, a woman working at an inn. Pure emotions bloom within a young man dedicated to traditional craftsmanship. Though he may be clumsy in his first attempts, you will come to admire his determined perseverance! (Source: Manga Cross, translated)

title: Player
synopsis: Through posting a "Best Comment", I somehow became the main character of a webtoon! (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Shiou no Kikan: Moto Yuusha no Ore, Jibun ga Soshiki Shita Chuuni Himitsu Kessha o Tomeru tame ni Futatabi Isekai ni Shoukan Sareteshimau
titleRomaji: Shiou no Kikan: Moto Yuusha no Ore, Jibun ga Soshiki Shita Chuuni Himitsu Kessha o Tomeru tame ni Futatabi Isekai ni Shoukan Sareteshimau
titleNative: 屍王の帰還　～元勇者の俺、自分が組織した厨二秘密結社を止めるために再び異世界に召喚されてしまう～
synonyms: The Return of the Corpse King
synopsis: "How can my past self get so excited doing all those embarrassing things!?" When he was in the third year of middle school, Hizaki Shiou was summoned to another world to save it. After defeating the Demon King, he was forcibly returned back to the present day. Yet another three years later, he is summoned to the other world once again, this time to stop the rampage of the secret society "Helheim." That organization was supposedly actually the one that he had founded during his chuunibyou phase, where he called himself the "Corpse King"—a dark past too embarrassing to remember! Someone seems to be impersonating the name of "Helheim" and tarnishing its reputation. To uncover the truth behind this mystery and clear the organization's name, the Corpse King reunites with his former subordinates, the "Hakkai," who once made Helheim the strongest it had ever been. While agonizing over his dark past, he begins to take action in the other world once again. Their first stop is the Steel City of Gagiul—rescue the city struggling through famine as well as the pale-looking count's daughter in distress. "Helheim, moving out. (Source: Comic-Walker, translated)

title: Aruiwa, Watashi no Meitantei
synopsis: High schooler Odagiri Momo leaves her home island to attend high school on the mainland. Having grown up on a boring island, Momo dreams of becoming a detective and is always on the lookout for cases. After moving into her first apartment, she meets the mysterious beauty Akaishi Kotone and falls for her at first sight. Declaring she'll make the reluctant Kotone her “assistant” against her will, the two form a buddy team to solve small everyday mysteries together. (Source: Kadokawa, translated)

title: Oshi ga Wagaya ni Yattekita!
titleNative: 推しが我が家にやってきた！
synonyms: My Idol Came To My House!
synopsis: "Please go out with me, with the intent of eventual marriage!" How will Sumire handle the unexpected proposal from her favorite actor Saki-kun? "I love you, but I'm just a fan. You can't be serious!?" As she spends time with Saki-kun every day, can Sumire avoid breaking the boundary between between idol and fan? It's a love comedy about a fan being pursued by her idol! (Source: Flex Comics, translated)

title: Yamato wa Koi no Mahoroba
titleNative: やまとは恋のまほろば
synonyms: Yamato is a Splendid Place for Love
synopsis: College student Sanwa Honoka is ridiculed by male students for her plump figure. As her best friend gets the most out of college life, her only solace is the Ancient Tomb Study Group, where she can talk about her favorite things, surrounded by two laid-back male members. However, Honoka considers member Iida as a lover at a certain moment. A poetic psychological depiction of how a girl with low self-esteem finds spiritual support and matures. (Source: Japan Media Arts Festival) Note: - A Jury Selection award winner in the Manga Section of the 23rd Japan Media Arts Festival. - Originally published on LINE Manga until it was cancelled on 2020-10-11. The serialization moved to Bunshun Online and new chapters published starting 2022-06-20.

title: Kimochi Warui kara Kimi ga Suki
titleRomaji: Kimochi Warui kara Kimi ga Suki
titleNative: きもちわるいから君がすき
synopsis: Tsukasa is in love with her best friend Yoriko, but she hides her feeling and lives her daily life as if nothing's wrong. In the meantime, Yoriko also seems to have deep affections for Tsukasa. This is a pure, precious, but disturbing story of their twisted love. (Source: Manga Time Kirara, translated)

title: Girls x Vampire
titleNative: ガールズ×ヴァンパイア
synopsis: "Yes! Yes! I finally bit one!" Luluna Von Bettelheim, four-hundred-year-old vampire of noble lineage, wakes from her long slumber, and on a whim, enrolls in a human school. There she bites a girl and gains a servant. "Shower me with praise!" she orders. But her command leads to even more affection an she expected. Teren Mikami (prose) and Minori Chigusa (manga) team up to bring you a sensual girls' comedy about a vampire and her cute, high-school servant Wakana. (Source: One Peace Books) Note: Originally self-published on Twitter and note, was then licensed by Akita Shoten for serialization.

title: The Reincarnation of the Strongest Exorcist In Another World
titleRomaji: Saikyou Onmyouji no Isekai Tenseiki: Geboku no Youkaidomo ni Kurabete Monster ga Yowai Sugirundaga @comic
titleEnglish: The Reincarnation of the Strongest Exorcist In Another World
titleNative: 最強陰陽師の異世界転生記 ～下僕の妖怪どもに比べてモンスターが弱すぎるんだが～
synonyms: The Reincarnation of the Strongest Onmyoji: These Monsters Are Too Weak Compared to My Youkai
The Reincarnation of the Strongest Onmyoji ~ These Monsters Are Too Weak Compared to My Youkai~
synopsis: Haruyoshi Kuga's power as the strongest exorcist is all for naught when he is betrayed by his closest ally. With his dying breath, he casts the secret Spell of Reincarnation—when he next opens his eyes, he finds himself in a different world altogether, reincarnated as Seika Lamprogue, the son of a family of magic scholars! He quickly learns that the magic in this new world is quite unlike the sorcery he learned in his past life and that he can't use it. Fortunately for him, with his mastery of curses and the hordes of youkai at his disposal, he doesn't need to. Haruyoshi (now Seika) is determined not to repeat his past mistakes in his second life by smartly laying low and avoiding flaunting his power. Yet accomplishing his goals and without drawing attention to himself proves to be easier said than done—will his powers be enough to live a happy life?! (Source: J-Novel Club)

title: Ookami to Koushinryou: Spring Log
synopsis: It has been more than ten years since Holo and Lawrence, who became a happily married couple after completing their long journey to send the Wisewolf back home, opened the bathhouse Spice and Wolf in the hot spring resort of Nyohhira. This is a story of continued happiness spun in the bathhouse, which is said to bring happiness and laughter.

titleRomaji: Megumi no Daigo: Kyuukoku no Orange
titleNative: め組の大吾 救国のオレンジ
synopsis: Shun Axeda struggled to overcome his own demons. Yuki Nakamura wanted to become one of the few female members of a special rescue team. And Daigo Juju met them with his outstanding talent and unshakable determination. These three firefighters aspired to join the Special Rescue Team (a.k.a. "Orange"), as the story of a "national crisis" in Japan began to unfold! (Source: Shounen Magazine, translated)

title: Jinmyaku Cheat de Hajimeru Hitomakase Eiyuu-tan
titleRomaji: Jinmyaku Cheat de Hajimeru Hitomakase Eiyuu-tan
titleNative: 人脈チートで始める人任せ英雄譚
synonyms: A Heroic Legend Where Everyone Else Does the Work and Starts With a Social Relations Cheat
synopsis: Net is a young man whose true skill lies in his large personal connections, which has allowed him to achieve great feats from behind the scenes. One day, however, his own king runs out of patience with him, and banishes him from the legendary heroes' party. Now he has to start again as an adventurer, though he plans to make full use of his connections with powerful knightly orders and other races.
chapterSourceTitle: Jinmyaku Cheat de Hajimeru Hitomakase Eiyuu-tan

title: The Re-Reincarnated Boy Lives Peacefully as an S-Rank Adventurer: I, a Sage and Hero in My Previous Lives, Will Live a Simple Life in My Next
titleRomaji: Nido Tensei Shita Shounen wa S Rank Boukensha Toshite Heion ni Sugosu: Zense ga Kenja de Eiyuu Datta Boku wa Raise de wa Jimi ni Ikiru
titleEnglish: The Re-Reincarnated Boy Lives Peacefully as an S-Rank Adventurer: I, a Sage and Hero in My Previous Lives, Will Live a Simple Life in My Next
titleNative: 二度転生した少年はSランク冒険者として平穏に過ごす～前世が賢者で英雄だったボクは来世では地味に生きる
synonyms: I who was a Sage and a Hero of Previous World, Will Live in Peacefullness in the Next World
A Boy Who Has Been Reincarnated Twice Spends Peacefully as an S-Rank Adventurer, ~ I who was a Sage and a Hero of Previous World, Will Live in Peacefullness in the Next World~
synopsis: "I was reincarnated again." Rex, a reincarnated boy with two past lives—a "Sage" and a "Hero." Having learned the dangers of standing out from the memories of those lives, he vows to live a simple third life as an "Adventurer." But that "simple" was way too "fancy" for normal people!! So begins the exciting fantasy adventure drama of the strongest boy with no self-awareness, overwhelming the people around him in his super new game plus!! (Source: MANGA UP!)

title: Zankyou
synopsis: Satoru spends his days listlessly in a factory town. The old man Segawa, a former Yakuza, lives in the room next to his cheap apartment. One day, Segawa tells Satoru, "I'll give you 5 million yen to put me out of my misery". Satoru hesitates, and Segawa sees through to the madness eating away inside him and begins to have a change of heart, and yet...!? A story of the filth of society and the dark path that Satoru takes, on the edge of sanity, with a gun and 5 million yen.
